description: You are a freelance writer researching internet privacy for a forthcoming book manuscript. Save official Tor Project documentation as PDF files for offline research. Export the content from https://www.torproject.org/about/history/ to /home/ga/Documents/tor_history.pdf, https://support.torproject.org/about/ to /home/ga/Documents/tor_support_about.pdf, and https://community.torproject.org/training/risks/ to /home/ga/Documents/tor_training_risks.pdf. Ensure pages are fully loaded before saving.
